data.body:
Brainstorm + decomposition + derisk spike for alto-fruit-punch (d251) — Provision AWS Gerrit + rebar MCP; lock GitHub main to Gerrit (the code-review dogfood prerequisite).

ARC
- Re-grounded in the prior decision record (session_log slap-tripe-vat / 9dba): Gerrit-on-AWS as the un-bypassable LLM-Review merge gate, GitHub as a read-only mirror (Go topology). Independent research (GitHub-native vs GerritHub vs self-host; Gerrit project health) was run; it pressure-tested but did NOT overturn the locked decision — the rationale (kernel-vote<->label mapping, copyCondition cost lever, submitWholeTopic, exactly-one-writer topology, prior art) holds. Premise challenge dropped.
- Locked the open design questions: live PoC (priorities: function+integrity > cost > reliability/reuse-if-free); freeze-and-restore, no break-glass; AWS justified (existing acct); repo public; org free -> repo-level lockdown with trusted-admin-override accepted; domain rebar.solutions.navateam.com; infra under infra/ excluded from distribution.
- Ran a prior-art research spike (4 agents): converged reference architecture = docker-compose Gerrit (official image) + nginx (NOT Caddy, %2F) + external MCP voter on Set Review REST + core Apache replication plugin (non-force) + repo-level ruleset lockdown + cost-lean single Graviton box (no ALB/NAT, gp3, SSM Parameter Store, roll-your-own Terraform).

DECOMPOSITION (created): epic d251 now has 7 child stories S1-S7 with ACs/deps. S1 TF base; S2 Gerrit+MCP deploy+nginx/TLS; S3 project+LLM-Review label+submit-req+submitWholeTopic; S4 bot identity+events+voter (proven pipe); S5 Gerrit->GitHub replication; S6 GitHub repo lockdown; S7 e2e proof+backup/restore+monitoring+runbooks. Sequence S1<-S2<-S3<-{S4,S5}; S5<-S6; {S4,S5,S6}<-S7.

DERISK EXPERIMENTS (real AWS CLI as root of 896586841071/us-east-1 + local Docker + gh) — all green:
- E1: default VPC vpc-01fb22d3dd50a364c; AL2023 arm64 AMI via SSM param; t4g.large in all AZs; run-instances --dry-run of the exact shape OK.
- E2: PUBLIC Route53 zone solutions.navateam.com exists in-account (Z05558453EZPQLHKC20IQ) -> the subdomain is a simple A record.
- E3: SSM SecureString put/get(decrypt)/delete validated.
- E4: Gerrit 3.14.1 boots on arm64 (pin a PATCH tag — bare 3.14/3.13 don't exist); submit-req predicate label:LLM-Review=MAX AND -has:unresolved parses (HTTP 200) on live Gerrit; nginx %2F-safe proxy passes nginx -t.
- E5: navapbc/rebar public, Issues off, 0 deploy keys, I'm admin; org FREE (repo-level only); EXISTING ruleset main-protection (PR+status-checks) must be REPLACED (incompatible with mirror lock); DeployKey-bypass ruleset payload shape confirmed.

Tickets updated with findings: S1/S5 derisk comments; S2 pinned to a real arm64 patch tag + nginx note; S3 empirically-validated config; S6 add 'replace main-protection' AC + free-org/admin-override note; epic decisions+derisk summary comment.

NEXT: run plan-review on the epic + each child to earn claim attestations, then S1 is the ready entry point. Cleanup: removed the local gerrit-derisk test container; Colima left running (I started it for E4 — co-tenant containers keycloak/parity-scan are present; `colima stop` if you want it down).
